import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import {Link,Routes, Route, Navigate, BrowserRouter,useNavigate} from 'react-router-dom'; import './Design.css'; function Cart(){ const[themeName,setTheme_Name]=useState(''); const[themePrice,setTheme_Price]=useState(''); const[themeDesc,setTheme_Desc]=useState(''); const handleClick=(e)=>{ e.preventDefault() const theme={themeName,themePrice,themeDesc} console.log(theme) fetch("http://localhost:8080/user/addC", { method:"POST", headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}, body:JSON.stringify(theme) }).then(()=>{alert("Theme Submitted")}) } return ( <>
Curtain Gifts Home < Link to = "/user/orders" className="link"> Orders < Link to = "/login" className="link">Logout
Add Themes





setTheme_Name(e.target.value)}>

setTheme_Price(e.target.value)}>

setTheme_Desc(e.target.value)}>






) } export default Cart;
